title: Scroll parallax (layered media depth)
description: The landonorris.com depth move: full-bleed media sits in a fixed-aspect frame and its inner image (plus foreground/caption layers) translate at different speeds as the frame crosses the viewport, so foreground lags and background drifts. Speed per layer via data-speed; driven by a single rAF loop reading each frame's progress.
a11y: prefers-reduced-motion: no parallax, layers stay put.
